title: Pipe Guns
description: An addon datapack for Gamingbarn's Guns that adds fun weaponry inspired by the pipe guns from the Fallout series!
body:
![Pipe Guns: A Gamingbarn's Guns Addon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7fe0f0358ea5fe82c3321dce43589ab64119f6e6.png) [![Gun Core dependency decorative image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d5cca0e504d6d4c12c05642e2f5e6ab43dbf04a.jpeg)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/gun-core) *For Minecraft versions 1.21.4 and above, Pipe Guns requires [Gun Core](https://modrinth.com/datapack/gun-core/versions), and for versions below 1.21.4, Pipe Guns requires [Gamingbarn's Guns](https://modrinth.com/datapack/gamingbarns-guns/versions)!* *(You shoot guns with `[Right-Click]` and reload by pressing `[F]`.)* ![Pipe Assault Rifle and Pipe Bolt-Action Rifle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58f5ef67af3ef94c0e3abef909cbc6953ac1a124.png)|Pipe Guns adds 6 new weapons inspired by the pipe guns from the Fallout series! These guns all cost a mix of copper and wood to craft, making them cheaper and more affordable than most guns. Despite their rag-tag asthetic, they still can pack quite a punch! ---|--- **All of the recipes for the guns in this pack can be viewed in the recipe book of the vanilla crafting table. To search for guns, you can type "shoot" into the search bar! You can also give youself the guns added by this datapack by running the give function: `/function give:[gun_name]`**|![The crafting table recipe book showing the pipe guns listed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e01bf14d9d7df48878569df9b7f1d5c99fcea1f2.png)~~~~ *You can make your own pack just like this by using the [Gun Generator](https://gamingbarn.net/GunGenerator) and [Ammo Generator](https://gamingbarn.net/AmmoGenerator) from my website!* > [![SparkedHost Promotional Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d880ee51aed06a8b0de318249c81b079793a8a8.jpeg)](https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=2775) > Want a Minecraft server? Consider SparkedHost! Use code GAMINGBARN for 25% off! > [![Discord Promotional Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6dc9d56feee16e94cb60cccde0087803114ac61.jpeg)]([https://discord.gg/dKMxTjchsg](https://discord.gg/dKMxTjchsg)) >
***https://discord.gg/dKMxTjchsg***
> Need help with my datapacks? Found a bug? Want to share some feedback? Join my Discord server! There, I can offer personal help towards any problem you may be having!
